threat_summary: Repeated authentication failures were observed during the current analysis window. The activity should be reviewed for potential password guessing while accounting for legitimate authentication errors.

new_rule_suggestions.title: Repeated Authentication Failure Detection
new_rule_suggestions.rationale: Repeated authentication failures were observed and may indicate password guessing activity.
new_rule_suggestions.false_positive_notes: Legitimate users repeatedly entering incorrect credentials may trigger this detection.
